---
title: "AI_Usage_Plots"
author: "Annika Richter"
date: "2026-05-13"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Load AI Usage data
df_ai_usage <- read.csv("../../Data/df_ai_usage.csv")
```

```{r}
# Colors
teal <- "#0397b2"
damped_light_blue <-"#b6e2ff"
```

```{r}
# Make the text bigger on all plots
theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(size = 16),   
      axis.title = element_text(size = 17),  
      legend.text = element_text(size = 15), 
      legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
      plot.tag = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), 
      strip.text = element_text(size = 16)
    )
)
```

```{r}
# Usage contexts (multi-select)
df_ai_usage$contexts <- sapply(ai_usage_list, function(x) {
  paste(unlist(x$usageContexts), collapse = ", ")
})

# Summary of all measures and values
print("AI Tools Used")
print(sort(table(unlist(lapply(ai_usage_list, function(x) unlist(x$general)))), decreasing = TRUE))

print("Usage Frequency")
print(sort(table(df_ai_usage$frequency), decreasing = TRUE))

print("Prompts Per Session")
print(sort(table(df_ai_usage$promptsPerSession), decreasing = TRUE))

print("Usage Contexts")
print(sort(table(unlist(lapply(ai_usage_list, function(x) unlist(x$usageContexts)))), decreasing = TRUE))

print("Using AI Since")
print(sort(table(df_ai_usage$since), decreasing = TRUE))
```

```{r}
# Unlist multiselect data for AI tools
df_ai_usage$tools <- sapply(ai_usage_list, function(x) {
  tools <- unlist(x$general)
  if (!is.null(x$generalOther) && x$generalOther != "") {
    tools <- c(tools, x$generalOther)
  }
  paste(tools, collapse = ", ")
})
head(df_ai_usage)
```
```{r}
# AI Tools data: Which AI Tools did participants use? 
df_ai_tools <- df_ai_usage %>%
  separate_rows(tools, sep = ", ") %>%
  count(tools, sort = TRUE)
df_ai_tools
```
```{r}
# Make a nicer plot?
p_ai_tools <- df_ai_tools %>% 
  filter(!is.na(n)) %>%
  arrange(n) %>%
  mutate(tools = factor(tools, tools)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tools, y = n)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_segment( aes(x=tools, xend=tools, y=0, yend=n)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.5, size = 7, color = "grey30") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_flip()+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))

p_ai_tools
```

```{r}
# Usage contexts: Unlist mulitselect data
df_ai_usage$contexts <- sapply(ai_usage_list, function(x) {
  paste(unlist(x$usageContexts), collapse = ", ")
})

# In which contexts are participants using AI tools? 
df_ai_contexts <- df_ai_usage %>%
  separate_rows(contexts, sep = ", ") %>%
  count(contexts, sort = TRUE)
df_ai_contexts
```
```{r}
# Recode AI contexts to be in english (apa7 guidelines)
df_ai_contexts <- df_ai_usage %>%
  separate_rows(contexts, sep = ", ") %>%
  count(contexts, sort = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(contexts = recode(contexts,
    "Persönliches Lernen" = "Personal Learning",
    "Arbeit"              = "Work",
    "Kreative Aufgaben"   = "Creative Tasks",
    "Andere"              = "Other",
    "Unterhaltung"        = "Entertainment",
    "Forschung"           = "Research",
    "Programmierung"      = "Programming"
  ))
```

```{r}
# Plot Contexts
p_ai_contexts <- df_ai_contexts %>% 
  filter(!is.na(n)) %>%
  arrange(n) %>%
  mutate(contexts = factor(contexts, contexts)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = contexts, y = n)) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_segment( aes(x=contexts, xend=contexts, y=0, yend=n)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.5, size = 7, color = "grey30") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x  = element_blank())+
  coord_flip()+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))

p_ai_contexts
```
```{r}
# How frequent to participants use AI Tools?
# Create Dataset
df_ai_freq<- df_ai_usage %>%
  count(frequency, sort = TRUE)
df_ai_freq
```

```{r}
# Create frequency plot
freq_order <- c("Almost constantly", "6-10 times per day", "3-5 times per day", "1-2 times per day", "Less than once per day", "Not at all")
shades_bg <- colorRampPalette(c(damped_light_blue, teal))(length(freq_order)) # Create color levels for the different frequencies

p_freq_stacked <- df_ai_freq %>%
  filter(!is.na(n)) %>%
  mutate(frequency = factor(frequency, levels = rev(freq_order))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = "Frequency of Usage", fill = frequency)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = shades_bg) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 6.5, color = "white", fontface="bold") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks  = element_blank())+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ 
  theme(legend.box.margin = margin(-50, 20, 0, 0))+ 
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))
p_freq_stacked
```

```{r}
# How many prompts per session

# Create Dataset
df_ai_prompts<- df_ai_usage %>%
  filter(promptsPerSession > 0) %>%
  count(promptsPerSession, sort = TRUE)

df_ai_prompts
```

```{r}
df_ai_prompts <- df_ai_usage %>%
  mutate(promptsPerSession = case_when(is.na(promptsPerSession) | promptsPerSession == 0 ~ "No AI Use", TRUE ~ as.character(promptsPerSession))) %>%
  count(promptsPerSession, sort = TRUE)

df_ai_prompts
```


```{r}
# Plot
ps_order <- c("1-2", "3-5", "6-10", "More than 10") # Prompts per session, order
shades_ps <- colorRampPalette(c(damped_light_blue, teal))(length(ps_order)) # Create the color categories for the different levels in prompt per session

p_ps_stacked <- df_ai_prompts %>%
  filter(!is.na(n)) %>%
  mutate(promptsPerSession = factor(promptsPerSession, levels = ps_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = "Prompts per Session", fill = promptsPerSession)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = shades_ps) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 6.5, color = "white", fontface="bold") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks  = element_blank())+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ 
  theme(legend.box.margin = margin(-100, 110, 0, 0))+ 
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))
p_ps_stacked
```

```{r}
# Since when do participant use AI tools?
# Create Dataset
df_ai_year<- df_ai_usage %>%
  count(since, sort = TRUE)

df_ai_year
```
```{r}
# Plot
p_ai_year <- df_ai_year %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = since, y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = teal, width = 0.3)+
  geom_text(aes(label = n),vjust = -0.3) +
  expand_limits(y = max(df_ai_year$n) * 1.1)+
  ylab(NULL)+
  xlab(NULL)

p_ai_year
```


```{r}
# Create a plot that contains A L L results from the AI usage questionnaire
# (For supervisors: The plot looks distorted in R, because it is optimized for the output pdf version)
layout <- "
AABB
AABB
AABB
AABB
AA##
AA##
CCDD
CCDD
EEDD
EEDD"

combined <- p_ai_tools + p_ai_contexts + p_freq_stacked +
            p_ai_year + p_ps_stacked +
            plot_layout(design = layout) +
            plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

ggsave("ai_usage_overview.pdf", combined,
       width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white", device = pdf)

```
